data.body:
On this day in 1995, the Boston Celtics played their last regular season game at the Hartford Civic Center (now PeoplesBank Arena).

Hartford and other alternate venues were reflected in Season mode in NBA Live 95 PC, with the games instead being played on a generic court.

data.body:
Honestly vyvanse for my adhd + lexapro for my anxiety/depression  is the perfect mix. 

Vyvanse is the holy grail of ADHD meds because of how it works with your body. However; I’ve had friends who didn’t have the same reaction. 

Medication roulette is one of the toughest things, I’m sorry dragon.
